info.description: Reusable link component with customizable URL, text, and styles

url_type.description: Type of URL; affects behavior and validation: 'text' for normal links, 'email' for mailto:, 'phone' for tel:

link_type.description: Presentation style for the component: 'link' renders inline hyperlink, 'button' renders a styled action button

label.description: Visible text displayed for the link or button

openInNewTab.description: When true, the link will open in a new browser tab/window (adds target='_blank')

iconify.description: When true, an icon will be shown alongside the label (requires icon configuration elsewhere)

icon_position.description: Placement of the icon relative to the label when iconify is enabled

social_media.description: When true, applies social media link styles (e.g., for Facebook, Twitter icons)

social_media_platform.description: Specifies the social media platform for styling when social_media is true
